creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 215119
patch to graphics/mesa-devel/Makefile

This allows a build of this port with poudriere on powerpc64 to at least get to:

  Ignored: is only for amd64 i386, while you are running powerpc64 (reason: Limited scope: no old drivers and no software rendering.

rather than the uninformative information that it is skipped (libunwind).
